bird.name: 黑额织巢鸟
bird.summary: 黑额织巢鸟（学名：Ploceus velatus）也称南方黑额织巢鸟、黑额织布鸟，为织布鸟科织布鸟属的一种。体长约11-14.5厘米，面部呈黑色，故名。通常群居，广泛分布于非洲南部地区。 外部链接 SASOL e-guide

relations.subject: 黑额织巢鸟
relations.evidence: This weaver is very widespread and found in a wide range of habitats, including shrubland, savanna, grassland, open woodland, inland wetlands and semi-desert areas
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
